_description: Machine-specific path config for STAG. Copy this file to local_paths.json (gitignored) and replace every <placeholder> with the real absolute path on this machine. Any key may also be overridden by the matching environment variable (STAG_DATA_DIR, STAG_HCS_DIR, STAG_AORAKI_*, STAG_DEER_DB_URL, etc.) - see stag/local_paths.py for the full key-to-env-var map.
data_root: <absolute path to your local working copy of the deer_2024 archive>
hcs_source: <absolute path to the HCS read-only DINZ archive mount>
aoraki_data_root: <absolute path to the Aoraki project archive (typically /projects/.../deer_2024)>
aoraki_db_folder: <absolute path to Aoraki .../new_file_sync/data/ (where make_deer_db writes deer_data.db)>
deer_db_url: <SQLAlchemy URL for the canonical deer_data_gps.db, e.g. sqlite:////absolute/path/to/deer_data_gps.db>
deer_db_url_legacy: <SQLAlchemy URL for the legacy deer_data.db, e.g. sqlite:////absolute/path/to/deer_data.db>
alex_home: <absolute path to the co-author's HPC home directory, if reproducing the original Aoraki sync/tortuosity runs>
